caption:
The air is warmer, and there is something quietly powerful about starting from the inside out. @lovestoriesintimates knows this well — two moods, one philosophy: the softness of silk and lace for those long, slow evenings, and the clean lines of ribbed cotton for mornings that ask you to move. Swipe to find yours.

Lingerie set (lace): @lovestoriesintimates
Lingerie set (ribbed): @lovestoriesintimates
